'''Tescia''' was a young [[Ferroan]] [[Gender/Legends|girl]] living on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] during the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] visit at the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She told [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] that his [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|grandfather]] had killed the [[Blood Carver]] without the use of a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
